prestazioni: AMG-sourced M139 2.0L turbocharged inline-4 (engine code: M139 E30) upgraded with a Garrett GTX3582R Gen II turbocharger (82mm compressor wheel, 106mm turbine wheel) and a custom 4-ply silicone intake manifold plenum by VRSF, supporting 400+ hp on 98 RON fuel with a BorgWarner EFR 8374 wastegate actuator

Ohlins TTX40 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and high-speed compression) and Lotus-specific spring rates (front: 120 N/mm, rear: 150 N/mm), paired with Eibach anti-roll bars (24mm front, 22mm rear) and spherical bearing subframe collars by Polyflex UK

AP Racing CP8660-1000 6-piston front brake calipers with 380mm two-piece rotors (J-Hook slotted, 32mm thickness) and Ferodo DS2500 pads, complemented by a custom stainless steel braided brake line kit from Goodridge and a Motul RBF 660 racing brake fluid flush
estetica: RML Group carbon fiber widebody kit (front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser) with integrated 3D-printed air curtains for optimized aero efficiency, finished in a custom 'Lotus Hethel Orange' satin wrap by Avery Dennison

Vorsteiner V-FF107 20-inch forged wheels (9.5J ET35 front, 11J ET45 rear) in a matte graphite finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35 R20 front, 295/30 R20 rear) with custom Lotus-branded center caps by BBS

Seibon Carbon fiber GT-style rear wing with a 1,200mm span and adjustable dual-element Gurney flaps, mounted on a custom aluminum pedestal with integrated LED brake light, paired with a front splitter extension by APR Performance and a custom underbody diffuser by Rocket Bunny
